+
+DISPATCH_ID: ISSUE-327
+AUTHOR: Executor / Claude

+RELATED_FILES:
+- Status.md — reconciled the live "PLAN compliance gaps beyond the 9 lints" row: stale "`physics` has no `kernel/diagnostics` integration" claim replaced with the true current posture
+- HANDOFF.md — reconciled the "Persistent gaps" physics bullet: struck the stale gap, recorded the diagnostics-integration + ledger-boundary posture
+- change.md — appended a forward-only ISSUE-327 reconciliation entry (evidence, non-goals, verification)
+- .ai/dispatch.tasks.md — marked task 89 DONE only (in-place heading edit; no backlog rewrite/reorder)
+STATUS: AWAITING_REVIEW
+
+## Task Packet Reference
+
+`ai_handoffs/ISSUE-327_TASK_2026-06-08_01-38-46+0300.md`
+
+## Pre-Execution Review Consumed
+
+No pre-execution review issued for this dispatch.
+
+## Current-State Claims: Falsification Re-run
+
+All Task Packet falsifying searches were re-run live before relying on them.
+
+- Claim: `rge-physics` already declares `rge-kernel-diagnostics` as a workspace dependency.
+  Re-run: `Grep 'rge-kernel-diagnostics' crates/physics/Cargo.toml` → `44:rge-kernel-diagnostics = { workspace = true }`. CONFIRMED.
+
+- Claim: Physics plugin missing-resource failures use plugin-host `PluginError::contract_violation(...)` and are documented as diagnostic auto-emission warning cases.
+  Re-run: `Grep 'auto-emit|contract_violation("World")|contract_violation("PhysicsInputLedger")' crates/physics/src/plugin_adapter.rs` → `43:` auto-emit downgrade note, `156:` auto-emit downgrade note, `160: .ok_or_else(|| PluginError::contract_violation("World"))?`, `167: return Err(PluginError::contract_violation("PhysicsInputLedger"))`. CONFIRMED. (Module-doc lines 41–58 read in full: missing resource → `ContractViolation`, auto-emit downgrades to warning per audit-2 A5.1; tick is infallible, `RuntimeFault` reserved for future fallible solver paths.)
+
+- Claim: Physics tests assert the diagnostic auto-emission severity for plugin contract violations and that sibling plugin diagnostics are not misattributed to physics.
+  Re-run: `Grep 'ContractViolation auto-emits as Warning|expected one auto-emit diagnostic|Severity::Warning|physics must not have produced failure diagnostics' crates/physics/tests/plugin_adapter_smoke.rs` → lines `21`, `223`, `228`, `232`, `468`. CONFIRMED.
+
+- Claim: The physics ledger boundary is documented and test-pinned as a separate domain ledger, not the generic kernel audit ledger.
+  Re-run: read `crates/physics/src/physics_input_ledger.rs:1–37` ("Why a domain ledger, not the kernel audit ledger"; `Vec<TickRecord>` of `PhysicsInput` vs `rge_kernel_audit_ledger::AuditLedger` generic `Event` stream; "No API-compatible swap exists") and `crates/physics/src/lib.rs:38–47` (physics intentionally does NOT migrate onto the shipped `rge_kernel_audit_ledger::AuditLedger`). CONFIRMED.
+
+- Claim: At planning time, live docs still contained stale current-gap wording to reconcile.
+  Re-run: `Grep 'kernel/diagnostics' Status.md HANDOFF.md` → `Status.md:314` contained "`physics` has no `kernel/diagnostics` integration"; `HANDOFF.md:1693` contained "`physics` has no kernel/diagnostics integration". CONFIRMED (both now reconciled).
+
+No re-run contradicted the Task Packet. Source posture matches the Planner's evidence exactly; no Rust change was required, so no halt condition triggered.
+

+# Task Packet
+
+DISPATCH_ID: ISSUE-327
+AUTHOR: Planner / OpenAI Codex
+TIMESTAMP: 2026-06-08_01-38-46+0300
+RELATED_FILES:
+- crates/physics/Cargo.toml
+- crates/physics/src/plugin_adapter.rs
+- crates/physics/src/physics_input_ledger.rs
+- crates/physics/src/lib.rs
+- crates/physics/tests/plugin_adapter_smoke.rs
+- crates/physics/tests/ledger_boundary.rs
+- plans/BASELINE.md
+- Status.md
+- HANDOFF.md
+- change.md
+- .ai/dispatch.tasks.md
+STATUS: OPEN
+
+## Goal
+
+Reconcile GitHub issue #327 by updating the current planning/status record for
+`crates/physics` diagnostics integration. Planner inspection found that
+`rge-physics` already depends on `rge-kernel-diagnostics` through the plugin
+host path, and physics tests already pin diagnostic auto-emission for plugin
+contract violations. Therefore this dispatch is a docs/status reconciliation,
+not a Rust implementation task: retire stale live wording that says physics has
+no `kernel/diagnostics` integration while preserving the documented
+`PhysicsInputLedger` boundary as a physics-domain ledger, not a substitute for
+`kernel/audit-ledger`.
+
+## Scope
+
+### MAY edit
+- `plans/BASELINE.md`
+- `Status.md`
+- `HANDOFF.md`
+- `change.md`
+- `.ai/dispatch.tasks.md`
+
+### MUST NOT edit
+- `crates/physics/src/**`
+- `crates/physics/tests/**`
+- `crates/physics/Cargo.toml`
+- `Cargo.toml`
+- `Cargo.lock`
+- `kernel/**`
+- `crates/**`
+- `runtime/**`
+- `editor/**`
+- `tools/**`
+- `docs/**`
+- `.github/**`
+- `Invoke-AiDispatch*.ps1`
+- `Register-AiDispatchSchedule.ps1`
+- `Get-AiDispatch*.ps1`
+- `Watch-AiDispatch.ps1`
+- `Wait-GitHubActions.ps1`
+- `new-handoff.ps1`
+- `.ai/dispatch.verify.ps1`
+- `.ai/*.schema.json`
+- `plans/PLAN.md`
+- `plans/IMPLEMENTATION.md`
+- `plans/fileandfolderstructure.md`
+- `plans/README.md`
+
+### MAY add new files
+- None.
+
+### MUST NOT add new files
+- No new project files. Protocol-generated execution artifacts are outside the
+  code/doc edit surface of this task.
+
+### Advisory machine-readable scope envelope
+
+<!-- handoff:envelope v1 -->
+MAY_EDIT:
+  - plans/BASELINE.md
+  - Status.md
+  - HANDOFF.md
+  - change.md
+  - .ai/dispatch.tasks.md
+MUST_NOT_EDIT:

+INCIDENTAL_OK: false
+<!-- /handoff:envelope -->
+
+## Deliverables
+
+- Re-read the current physics diagnostics posture before editing docs, using
+  the source/test anchors in `RELATED_FILES`.
+- Add forward-style status reconciliation for ISSUE-327 in the allowed docs.
+  At minimum, update the live/current stale gap wording in `Status.md` and
+  `HANDOFF.md` that still says physics has no `kernel/diagnostics`
+  integration. Use `plans/BASELINE.md` only if there is a live current baseline
+  statement to reconcile; do not manufacture a new baseline section if the
+  status/handoff docs are sufficient.
+- Add a `change.md` entry recording the reconciliation, evidence consulted,
+  non-goals, and verification result.
+- Mark `.ai/dispatch.tasks.md` task 89 done only after the docs/status
+  reconciliation and verification are complete.
+- Write the EXECUTION_REPORT with the exact evidence and gate results.
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+
+- Current status docs no longer present an unqualified live gap claiming
+  "`physics` has no `kernel/diagnostics` integration". If old historical
+  records remain, they must remain clearly historical and not read as the
+  current task backlog.
+- The reconciliation explicitly states the current source posture:
+  `rge-physics` already has `rge-kernel-diagnostics` as a workspace dependency,
+  physics plugin contract violations flow through the plugin-host diagnostic
+  auto-emission path, missing-resource contract violations are warnings, and
+  physics has no current fallible solver/runtime-fault diagnostic surface.
+- The reconciliation explicitly preserves the ledger boundary:
+  `PhysicsInputLedger` remains a typed, per-tick physics-domain ledger and is
+  not a replacement for `rge_kernel_audit_ledger::AuditLedger`.
+- No Rust source, Rust tests, Cargo manifests, Cargo lockfile, architecture
+  lint policy, workflow, scheduler, dispatch automation, ADR, or unrelated doc
+  file changes are present.
+- `.ai/dispatch.tasks.md` is changed only to mark task 89 done; no backlog
+  rewrite, reordering, or new task is introduced.
+- `git diff --check` exits 0.
+
+## Current-State Claims: Falsification Required
+
+Every negative / "unchanged" assertion this packet makes about current source
+MUST list its inverse-search command and result. A negative claim without a
+falsifying search is not a valid premise (Protocol Rule 8).
+
+- Claim: `rge-physics` already declares `rge-kernel-diagnostics` as a workspace
+  dependency.
+  Falsifying search: `Select-String -Path 'crates/physics/Cargo.toml' -Pattern 'rge-kernel-diagnostics'` -> `crates\physics\Cargo.toml:44:rge-kernel-diagnostics = { workspace = true }`.
+
+- Claim: Physics plugin missing-resource failures already use plugin-host
+  `PluginError::contract_violation(...)` and are documented as diagnostic
+  auto-emission warning cases.
+  Falsifying search: `Select-String -Path 'crates/physics/src/plugin_adapter.rs' -Pattern 'auto-emit','contract_violation\(\"World\"\)','contract_violation\(\"PhysicsInputLedger\"\)'` -> lines 43 and 156 mention auto-emit warning downgrade; line 160 returns `contract_violation("World")`; line 167 returns `contract_violation("PhysicsInputLedger")`.
+
+- Claim: Physics tests already assert the diagnostic auto-emission severity for
+  plugin contract violations and that sibling plugin diagnostics are not
+  misattributed to physics.
+  Falsifying search: `Select-String -Path 'crates/physics/tests/plugin_adapter_smoke.rs' -Pattern 'ContractViolation auto-emits as Warning','expected one auto-emit diagnostic','Severity::Warning','physics must not have produced failure diagnostics'` -> lines 223, 228, 232, and 468 confirm those assertions.
+
+- Claim: The physics ledger boundary is already documented and test-pinned as
+  a separate domain ledger, not the generic kernel audit ledger.
+  Falsifying search: `Select-String -Path 'crates/physics/src/physics_input_ledger.rs','crates/physics/tests/ledger_boundary.rs','crates/physics/src/lib.rs' -Pattern 'domain ledger','kernel audit ledger','kernel/audit-ledger','PhysicsInputLedger'` -> `physics_input_ledger.rs` lines 7, 28, and 36; `ledger_boundary.rs` lines 1, 4, 14, 22, and 25; `lib.rs` lines 38, 44, and 45.
+
+- Claim: At planning time, live docs still contained stale current-gap wording
+  to reconcile.
+  Falsifying search: `Select-String -Path 'Status.md','HANDOFF.md' -Pattern 'kernel/diagnostics'` -> `Status.md:314` includes "`physics` has no `kernel/diagnostics` integration"; `HANDOFF.md:1693` includes "`physics` has no kernel/diagnostics integration".
+
+## Constraints / Non-Goals
+
+- This is not an audit-only packet because it permits docs/status edits, but it
+  is source-read-only. Do not change Rust code or tests.
+- Do not add diagnostics APIs, new diagnostic emissions, new plugin-host
+  behavior, new failure classes, new lints, new Cargo dependencies, or new test
+  files.
+- Do not migrate, wrap, rename, or reinterpret `PhysicsInputLedger`.
+- Do not introduce a dual ledger, adapter ledger, or audit-ledger projection.
+- Do not edit old historical `change.md` entries or old historical handoff
+  chronology except where a current/live status section itself carries stale
+  wording.
+- Do not mark task 89 done until the docs/status reconciliation has landed and
+  `git diff --check` has passed.
+
+## Verification Gates
+
+The Executor MUST run and document the result of each of these in their
+`EXECUTION_REPORT`:
+
+- `git diff --check` -> expected exit 0.
+- `git diff --name-only -- plans/BASELINE.md Status.md HANDOFF.md change.md .ai/dispatch.tasks.md` -> expected to list only the allowed docs/status files that were actually edited.
+- `git diff -- crates/physics/src crates/physics/tests crates/physics/Cargo.toml Cargo.toml Cargo.lock` -> expected empty.
+
+Rust gates are intentionally not required because this task forbids Rust
+changes. If any Rust source/test/Cargo change appears necessary, halt instead
+of editing it. If the Executor somehow makes a Rust change before noticing the
+scope conflict, they must revert only their own Rust change, halt, and request
+fresh Planner guidance; do not proceed by running Rust gates under this TASK.
+
+## Halt Conditions
+
+The Executor MUST halt (without committing) and request fresh guidance if any
+of the following occur:
+
+- Current source contradicts the Planner's evidence and a real diagnostics
+  emission or physics test change is required.
+- Reconciliation would require editing any Rust source, Rust test, Cargo file,
+  architecture lint, dispatch automation script, ADR, or doc outside the
+  allowed files.
+- The only apparent fix would migrate or conflate `PhysicsInputLedger` with
+  `kernel/audit-ledger`.
+- `.ai/dispatch.tasks.md` cannot be marked done without broader backlog edits.
+- `git diff --check` fails and cannot be fixed inside the allowed files.
+
+## Planner Notes
+
+Planner inspection found that the old gap appears to be documentation drift:
+`crates/physics/Cargo.toml` already depends on `rge-kernel-diagnostics`, the
+plugin adapter's missing-resource paths return plugin-host contract violations,
+and `plugin_adapter_smoke.rs` tests assert diagnostic warning auto-emission.
+The remaining stale statements are in current status/gap docs, especially
+`Status.md` and `HANDOFF.md`. Keep the reconciliation forward-style and
+evidence-grounded: record what is true now, preserve old chronology as history,
+and do not churn source that already covers the issue.
+

The two-crate wording was only the **critical-path attribution path** that `cargo tree -i wasmtime` surfaces, not the complete direct-dependency set. Reworded `plans/BASELINE.md` §13.3, `Status.md`, `HANDOFF.md`, and this `change.md` entry to distinguish the attribution path from the four direct dependents, and updated the Pulley/feature-gate remediation candidates so they are scoped to all four (`script-host`/`script-bench` would otherwise keep pulling cranelift/winch). **Fix 2 — undocumented local parsing command for `unit-data.json`.** The original ad-hoc extraction command that produced `.ai/dispatch-ISSUE-322/unit-data.json` was not captured at measurement time; this is stated explicitly.
